warning:
⚠️ WARNING! This looks very much like a scam!

{explanation}

Do NOT:
• Share SMS codes
• Transfer money
• Install apps requested by callers

Hang up and call your bank yourself using the number on your card.
alert_to_contacts:
🚨 FRAUD ALERT!

{wardName} reports a suspicious situation:
"{triggerText}"

Analysis: {analysis}

Contact {wardName} immediately!

patterns.bank_call: A real bank NEVER asks for SMS codes over the phone.
patterns.safe_account: A 'safe account' is ALWAYS a scam. There is no such thing.
patterns.police_call: Real police officers don't call demanding money transfers.
patterns.remote_access: Never install remote access apps at a stranger's request.
patterns.secret_operation: 'Don't tell anyone' is a classic scam technique. Real authorities don't operate this way.
patterns.prize_win: You can't win a prize in a contest you didn't enter.
